overall.description: A first-person walk along a sunny beach approaching the Del Perro Pier amusement park from Grand Theft Auto V. The camera moves steadily across sandy terrain toward the wooden pier structure featuring a Ferris wheel and roller coaster, with clear blue skies and calm ocean waters visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching amusement pier

events.description: wooden lifeguard tower comes into view on the left side of the beach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across dry sand toward the pier amusement park in the distance

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the ocean with support pilings visible
large colorful Ferris wheel at the end of the pier
yellow and white roller coaster tracks extending from the pier
wide expanse of light tan sand covering the foreground
calm blue ocean stretching to the horizon
wooden lifeguard station with red flag on the left side of the beach

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide sandy beach toward the Del Perro Pier amusement park in the distance. The wooden pier structure with its Ferris wheel and roller coaster dominates the center view while the ocean stretches to the left. A lifeguard tower comes into view on the left as the camera progresses along the dry sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach with lifeguard tower on left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach parallel to the shoreline, passing the lifeguard tower

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the beach with the lifeguard tower now visible on the left side. The pier and amusement rides grow larger as the camera approaches, while the ocean draws nearer on the left. The sand remains dry and firm underfoot as scattered pedestrians appear in the distance near the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline at water's edge with waves

events.description: camera reaches the shoreline where ocean waves meet the wet sand

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge where waves lap at the sand, approaching the pier

entered.detail: gentle ocean waves washing onto the sand creating white foam
tall white modern building visible behind the pier on the right

segments.scene_description: Reaching the water's edge where gentle waves lap at the wet sand. The camera moves along the shoreline with the pier structure now prominent on the right and coastal buildings visible in the background. The ocean water fills the left foreground while the Ferris wheel reflects sunlight overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a wide sandy beach that gradually converges at the water's edge beneath a towering amusement pier. It begins with a steady walk across dry sand toward the distant Del Perro Pier, where the Ferris wheel and roller coaster dominate the horizon as the ocean stretches out to the left. As the camera progresses, a lifeguard tower appears on the left and the amusement rides grow larger and more imposing, while scattered pedestrians emerge in the distance near the shoreline. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the water's edge, moving from the firm dry sand to the wet shoreline where gentle waves lap at the ground. Finally, the ocean fills the left foreground and the pier structure becomes prominent on the right, with the sunlight reflecting off the Ferris wheel against a backdrop of coastal buildings.
